title: Deguelia densiflora
taxonomy: Deguelia densiflora belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a part of the Legume family, which includes a vast array of flowering plants. Deguelia densiflora is a species of flowering plant that is known for its dense clusters of small flowers. Further classification of Deguelia densiflora may involve its genus and species within the Fabaceae family.
